meta.title: Policies | SNC Beauty Salon & Spa
meta.description: Read our salon policies including reservations, cancellations, refunds, age requirements and more.

policies.title: Policies & Procedures
policies.subtitle: Thank you for choosing us for your beauty needs. We are committed to providing top-quality service in a comfortable and enjoyable atmosphere. The following policies are intended to enhance everyone's experience with us.

reservations.title: Reservations policy
reservations.p1: For all services: advanced reservation is recommended. A major credit card is required to hold reservation(s). If you need to cancel or reschedule, we require 24 to 48 hours' notice.
reservations.warning: Appointments canceled, changed or rescheduled in less than 24 hours will be billed 100% of each service. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

discounts.title: Discount policy
discounts.p1: Please be advised that all discounted gift cards, gift certificates, package deals and spa week offers cannot be combined with any other offers in the salon & spa, discounts and promotions.

giftCards.title: Gift cards policy
giftCards.intro: Gift cards are a wonderful way to give the gift of health, wellness and beauty to special people in your life.
giftCards.b1: Gift cards can be purchased at the salon or online. Gift cards are treated as cash — all lost or stolen gift cards are strictly non-refundable, not redeemable for cash and not replaceable.
giftCards.b2: Purchasing a gift certificate with another gift certificate is prohibited. Gift certificates can only be used for services or products. Our gift cards never expire for their cash value.
giftCards.b3: All discounted gift cards, gift certificates, package deals and spa week offers cannot be combined with any other services, offers, discounts or promotions in our salon & spa.
giftCards.highlight: First time clients receive 20% off any spa services. Some restrictions may apply.

gratuities.title: Gratuities
gratuities.p1: Gratuities are preferred in cash, Venmo, CashApp or Zelle.

payment.title: Payment methods
payment.p1: We accept cash, Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Zelle or Venmo. We do not accept personal checks.

age.title: Age requirement policy
age.b1: Spa guests must be 18 years of age or older to receive treatments without approval or accompaniment of an adult.
age.b2: 16–17 years old: generally allowed to receive spa services such as facials or other services with parental consent.
age.b3: Under 16: frequently required to have a parent or guardian present in the room during treatments.

refunds.title: Refund policy
refunds.b1: All service, series and gift card sales are final.
refunds.b2: Unopened items may be returned within 14 days with proof of purchase as required by SNC Beauty Salon & Spa in order for any exchanges or refunds to be given.
refunds.b3: Due to health regulations, we regret that we cannot accept opened or used returns of skin care products or other accessories.

lateArrivals.title: Late arrivals policy
lateArrivals.b1: We will always try our best to accommodate you if you're running behind, stuck in traffic, etc.
lateArrivals.b2: Your tardiness can affect the remainder of our team's day by delaying them for clients who come in on time. For this reason, we have set a few general ground rules for such situations.
lateArrivals.b3: Clients will generally be allowed a 15-minute grace period.

boundaries.title: Professional boundaries
boundaries.p1: All aspects of treatment can usually be modified to your taste: amount of light, type of music, and whether you choose to have a conversation or enjoy the treatment in silence.
boundaries.b1: Feel free to ask questions — your specialist will appreciate knowing your thoughts and clarifying any issues you may have.

mobileSpa.title: Mobile spa service policies
mobileSpa.p1: As mobile spa estheticians we bring all necessary equipment such as portable beds/tables, linens, and hospital grade sanitizers. Clients are responsible for notifying the provider of any contagious illnesses, medications, or medical conditions prior to the treatment.
mobileSpa.p2: Mobile phones must be silenced or turned off. Voices must be kept to a minimum in relaxation and treatment areas. When booking an at-home or corporate event spa, the following guidelines and standards apply.

spaParties.title: Spa parties — everyone is VIP
spaParties.p1: Who doesn't like to relax at a spa? Well, now you can experience both in the comfort of your own personal setting.
spaParties.p2: Spa parties are a great way to have fun with the people you love — whether it's for a birthday, baby shower, wedding shower, girl's or guy's night out, holiday party, sweet sixteen, bachelor or bachelorette party, or a kids/teens and adults celebration.
spaParties.p3: Our Mobile Spa is "Making Wellness Popular," bringing massage, skin care and pedicure/manicure treatments directly to your home, office, hotel or event.
spaParties.b1: If you are planning a session or corporate event, let us know as early as possible.

whatWeNeed.title: What we want to know
whatWeNeed.b1: How many guests are you expecting?
whatWeNeed.b2: What is the age of the kids attending?
whatWeNeed.b3: What services are you looking for?

lost.title: Lost / stolen items
lost.p1: SNC Beauty Salon & Spa is not responsible for any lost, stolen, or damaged items.

sexual.title: Sexual interaction
sexual.warning: Sexual interaction or discussion of any kind between the client and the specialist will never be appropriate.

policies.footer: © SNC Beauty Salon & Spa — All rights reserved.
